title: Manage AI assistants
hint: Install or remove Gemini, Claude, CodeBuddy, and other AI assistants. For installed assistants, use the in-app toggle to show or hide each one in the thinking engine panel.

backendDesc.gemini: Google Gemini — official assistant with chat and tools

messages.enabledSuccess: {{name}} is now visible in the thinking engine
messages.disabledSuccess: {{name}} is hidden from the thinking engine
messages.toggleFailed: Failed to update thinking engine visibility
